name: Street Fighting Grandma
short_description: Guide the Grandma through the mean streets and figure out what is really happening in the city
detailed_description:
Check out this other game by DiscoCarGames a relaxing fun cleaning game.



check out some awesome Street Fighting Grandma Gameplay in this video.



Street Fighting Grandma

Guide your grandma to her house in the mean streets late at night. Things start to get weird, find out what is really going on in the City. With Seven game modes

Seven Game Modes

Follow

Guide the robots through the level, try and get them to safety by taking them to your house, Guide the robots through five different levels.

Collect The Papers

Explore the city and find five players in this relaxing game mode

Abducted

Aliens have put you on their space ship, work out how to get out of the space ship. Also collect five newspaper on the space ship too.

DownHill

Jump down hill and fight off enemies, try and get the best score.

Survival

Ten enemies will come and hunt you down, try and see if you can defeat all ten enemies.

Groceries

Take your groceries to your home, but do not let the bad guys destory them.

Story Mode

Go through ten levels and explore them, figure out what really is happening in this town

Support

I have another game mode in the works and other various updates!
